message.content:
Esplora lo stato attuale della macchina per capire cosa manca per completare la workstation stateless. Esegui questi comandi e riporta i risultati completi:

1. `ls ~/.local/share/chezmoi/` - struttura chezmoi
2. `ls ~/.local/share/chezmoi/dot_config/` - config trackate
3. `cat ~/.local/share/chezmoi/run_once_after_20-clone-repos.sh.tmpl` - lista repos
4. `ls ~/Codice/` - repos presenti
5. `cat ~/.local/share/chezmoi/.chezmoiignore`
6. `ls -la ~/.local/share/chezmoi/private_dot_ssh/`
7. `cat ~/.local/share/chezmoi/dot_bashrc.tmpl`
8. `ls ~/.local/share/chezmoi/dot_config/` 
9. `cat ~/.gitconfig 2>/dev/null || echo MISSING`
10. `ls /tmp/1p-import/` - chiavi SSH da importare
11. `chezmoi status 2>/dev/null` - diff chezmoi
12. `ls ~/Vault/` e `ls ~/Vault/LifeOS/ | wc -l` - vault
13. `ls ~/Scripts/` - scripts
14. `op account list 2>/dev/null` - 1Password status
15. `systemctl --user status 1password 2>/dev/null | head -5`

content.text: Eseguirò i comandi per esplorare lo stato della workstation stateless. Poiché molti sono indipendenti, li farò in parallelo.

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Clona tutti i repo personali in ~/Codice/
# Gira una volta sola (re-run se questo file cambia)
set -euo pipefail

CODICE="$HOME/Codice"
mkdir -p "$CODICE"

clone_if_missing() {
  local repo="$1"
  local dir="$CODICE/$(basename $repo)"
  if [[ ! -d "$dir/.git" ]]; then
    echo "Cloning $repo..."
    git clone "https://github.com/$repo.git" "$dir"
  else
    echo "Already exists: $(basename $repo)"
  fi
}

# Repos soliwkr
clone_if_missing soliwkr/rank-rent-studio
clone_if_missing soliwkr/eternal-stack-kingdom
clone_if_missing soliwkr/dotfiles

# Repos soliwalker
clone_if_missing soliwalker/verbum-lucis
clone_if_missing soliwalker/eternal-stack
clone_if_missing soliwalker/telegram-ranketogram
clone_if_missing soliwalker/telegram-realestate

echo "Codice pronto in $CODICE"

URL                 EMAIL                USER ID
my.1password.com    soliwkr@gmail.com    77GOF4OSGRC7TLCCRZJ22AELNQ

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Prompts to generate an SSH key if none exists. Runs once.
set -euo pipefail

if [[ -f "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519" ]]; then
  exit 0
fi

echo ""
echo "No SSH key found. Generate one? [y/N]"
read -r answer </dev/tty
if [[ "${answer,,}" != "y" ]]; then
  exit 0
fi

mkdir -p "$HOME/.ssh"
chmod 700 "$HOME/.ssh"
ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -C "{{ .email }}" -f "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519" -N "" </dev/tty

eval "$(ssh-agent -s)"
ssh-add "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519"

echo ""
echo "Public key (add to https://github.com/settings/keys):"
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
cat "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub"
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
echo ""
echo "Press enter after adding the key to GitHub..."
read -r </dev/tty

# Switch chezmoi remote to SSH (if using HTTPS)
REMOTE=$(git -C "$HOME/.local/share/chezmoi" remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null || true)
if [[ "$REMOTE" == https://github.com/* ]]; then
  SLUG="${REMOTE#https://github.com/}"
  git -C "$HOME/.local/share/chezmoi" remote set-url origin "git@github.com:$SLUG"
  echo "Remote switched to SSH: git@github.com:$SLUG"
fi

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Installs system packages. Runs once (hash changes when packages-*.txt changes).
# chezmoi re-runs this if packages-arch.txt or packages-fedora.txt changes.
# hash: {{ include (joinPath .chezmoi.homeDir ".local/share/chezmoi/dot_config/packages-arch.txt") | sha256sum }}{{ include (joinPath .chezmoi.homeDir ".local/share/chezmoi/dot_config/packages-fedora.txt") | sha256sum }}

set -euo pipefail
info()    { echo -e "\033[1;34m==>\033[0m $*"; }
success() { echo -e "\033[1;32m✓\033[0m $*"; }
warn()    { echo -e "\033[1;33m!\033[0m $*"; }

{{ if eq .chezmoi.osRelease.id "arch" -}}
# ── Arch Linux ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
sudo pacman -Sy --needed --noconfirm git base-devel

# Install yay if missing
if ! command -v yay &>/dev/null; then
  info "Installing yay..."
  git clone https://aur.archlinux.org/yay.git /tmp/yay-bootstrap
  (cd /tmp/yay-bootstrap && makepkg -si --noconfirm)
  rm -rf /tmp/yay-bootstrap
fi

# Install Omarchy (sets up keyring + DE defaults)
if [[ ! -d "$HOME/.local/share/omarchy" ]]; then
  info "Installing Omarchy..."
  git clone https://github.com/basecamp/omarchy.git "$HOME/.local/share/omarchy"
  bash "$HOME/.local/share/omarchy/boot.sh"
fi

# Install packages from list
PKGS_FILE="$HOME/.config/packages-arch.txt"
if [[ -f "$PKGS_FILE" ]]; then
  info "Installing Arch packages..."
  mapfile -t pkgs < <(grep -v '^#' "$PKGS_FILE")
  to_install=()
  for pkg in "${pkgs[@]}"; do
    [[ -z "$pkg" ]] && continue
    pacman -Qi "$pkg" &>/dev/null || to_install+=("$pkg")
  done
  if [[ ${#to_install[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
    yay -S --needed --noconfirm "${to_install[@]}" || warn "Some packages failed — check manually"
  fi
fi

{{ else if eq .chezmoi.osRelease.id "fedora" -}}
# ── Fedora ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
sudo dnf upgrade -y --refresh

# Enable RPM Fusion
sudo dnf install -y \
  "https://mirrors.rpmfusion.org/free/fedora/rpmfusion-free-release-$(rpm -E %fedora).noarch.rpm" \
  "https://mirrors.rpmfusion.org/nonfree/fedora/rpmfusion-nonfree-release-$(rpm -E %fedora).noarch.rpm" \
  || true

# Enable COPR for some tools
sudo dnf copr enable -y pgdev/ghostty || true

PKGS_FILE="$HOME/.config/packages-fedora.txt"
if [[ -f "$PKGS_FILE" ]]; then
  info "Installing Fedora packages..."
  mapfile -t pkgs < <(grep -v '^#' "$PKGS_FILE" | grep -v '^$')
  sudo dnf install -y "${pkgs[@]}" || warn "Some packages failed — check manually"
fi

# Install mise (not in dnf repos)
if ! command -v mise &>/dev/null; then
  curl https://mise.run | sh
fi

{{ else -}}
echo "Unsupported distro: {{ .chezmoi.osRelease.id }}. Add package install logic to run_once_before_00-packages.sh.tmpl"
{{ end -}}

success "Packages done"

[data]
    name = "Walker White"
    email = "soliwkr@gmail.com"
/home/soliwkr/.local/share/chezmoi/dot_bashrc.tmpl:# If not running interactively, don't do anything (leave this at the top of this file)

# Use 1Password SSH agent for all connections
# Keys live in 1Password vault — no private keys on disk
Host *
    IdentityAgent ~/.1password/agent.sock
    ServerAliveInterval 60
    ServerAliveCountMax 3
    ControlMaster auto
    ControlPath ~/.ssh/control-socket-%h-%p-%r
    ControlPersist 3600
    StrictHostKeyChecking accept-new

# Servers
Host soliwkr
    HostName 89.167.65.226
    User root

Host verbum-lucis-vps
    HostName 158.69.219.187
    User debian

content.text:
Perfetto! Ora ho una visione completa. Ecco il **RAPPORTO COMPLETO DELLO STATO DELLA WORKSTATION STATELESS**:

---

## ANALISI DELLO STATO DELLA WORKSTATION STATELESS

### 1. STRUTTURA CHEZMOI
**Percorso:** `/home/soliwkr/.local/share/chezmoi/`

**Contenuti:**
```
dot_bash_profile          - Profilo bash minimale
dot_bashrc.tmpl           - Configurazione bash con Omarchy
dot_XCompose              - Caratteri composti X
dot_config/               - Configurazioni di app (alacritty, btop, fastfetch, fontconfig, 
                            ghostty, git, hypr, kitty, lazygit, mise, nvim, omarchy, 
                            starship, tmux, walker, waybar)
private_dot_ssh/          - Configurazione SSH (privatizzata)
run_once_before_00-packages.sh.tmpl     - Installazione pacchetti (Arch/Fedora)
run_once_after_10-ssh-key.sh.tmpl       - Setup chiave SSH ed25519
run_once_after_20-clone-repos.sh.tmpl   - Clone repository
.chezmoi.toml.tmpl        - Configurazione chezmoi (name: Walker White, email: soliwkr@gmail.com)
.chezmoiignore            - File ignorati da chezmoi
.git/                     - Repository git di chezmoi
```

### 2. CONFIGURAZIONI TRACKATE IN DOT_CONFIG
**Directory `/home/soliwkr/.local/share/chezmoi/dot_config/`**
- alacritty, btop, fastfetch, fontconfig, ghostty, git, hypr, kitty, lazygit, mise, nvim, omarchy
- starship.toml (shell prompt)
- packages-arch.txt, packages-fedora.txt (liste pacchetti distro-specifici)
- bootstrap.sh (script bootstrap per configurazioni avanzate)

### 3. REPOSITORY DA CLONARE
**Script:** `/home/soliwkr/.local/share/chezmoi/run_once_after_20-clone-repos.sh.tmpl`

**Repository definiti:**
```
soliwkr/rank-rent-studio
soliwkr/eternal-stack-kingdom
soliwkr/dotfiles
soliwalker/verbum-lucis
soliwalker/eternal-stack
soliwalker/telegram-ranketogram
soliwalker/telegram-realestate
```

**Repository EFFETTIVAMENTE PRESENTI in ~/Codice/:**
```
eternal-stack                 ✓ Clonato
eternal-stack-kingdom         ✓ Clonato
rank-rent-studio             ✓ Clonato
telegram-ranketogram         ✓ Clonato
telegram-realestate          ✓ Clonato
the-cross-seo                ✓ (Extra, non in lista)
verbum-lucis                 ✓ Clonato
verbum-lucis-king            ✓ (Extra, non in lista)
verbum-lucis-prototype       ✓ (Extra, non in lista)
```

**MANCANTE:** `soliwkr/dotfiles` - Non è stato clonato (è il repo chezmoi stesso!)

### 4. FILE IGNORATI DA CHEZMOI (`.chezmoiignore`)
```
Secrets management:
  .ssh/id_* .ssh/authorized_keys .ssh/known_hosts
  .gnupg/** .config/keyrings/** .pki/**

Runtime/browser state:
  .config/chromium/** .config/dconf/** .config/fcitx** .config/ibus/**

Omarchy runtime theme state:
  .config/omarchy/current/**

Caches/state:
  .cache/** .npm/** .local/state/** .local/share/nvim/**
  .local/share/keyrings/** .local/share/mise/installs/**

XDG user dirs:
  Desktop Documents Music Pictures Public Templates Videos Downloads

Misc:
  .bash_history *.log *.bak
```

### 5. SSH CONFIGURATION
**Percorso:** `/home/soliwkr/.local/share/chezmoi/private_dot_ssh/private_config`

**Configurazione attuale:**
```
Host *
    IdentityAgent ~/.1password/agent.sock    # 1Password SSH agent
    ServerAliveInterval 60
    ControlMaster auto
    ControlPath ~/.ssh/control-socket-%h-%p-%r
    StrictHostKeyChecking accept-new

Host soliwkr
    HostName 89.167.65.226
    User root

Host verbum-lucis-vps
    HostName 158.69.219.187
    User debian
```

**Note:** Usa 1Password SSH agent - NO chiavi private su disco!

### 6. SSH KEY DA IMPORTARE
**Percorso:** `/tmp/1p-import/`

**Chiavi presenti:**
```
dokploy             - Chiave per deploy Dokploy
git_soliwalker_legacy - Chiave Git legacy
hetzner_soliwkr     - Chiave Hetzner
id_ed25519          - Chiave SSH principale
```

### 7. BASHRC CONFIGURAZIONE
**File template:** `/home/soliwkr/.local/share/chezmoi/dot_bashrc.tmpl`
**File deployed:** `~/.bashrc` (identico)

**Contenuto:**
```bash
# Conditional per Arch Linux: fonte di Omarchy default
{{ if eq .chezmoi.osRelease.id "arch" }}
    source ~/.local/share/omarchy/default/bash/rc
{{ end }}

# Exports custom:
export PATH=/home/{{ .chezmoi.username }}/.opencode/bin:$PATH
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
```

### 8. GITCONFIG
**Status:** **MISSING** - Non trackato in chezmoi
```bash
$ cat ~/.gitconfig 2>/dev/null || echo "MISSING"
# Output: MISSING
```

**Dovrebbe contenere:**
```toml
[user]
    name = "Walker White"
    email = "soliwkr@gmail.com"
```

### 9. VAULT STRUCTURE
**Percorso:** `~/Vault/`

**Contenuti:**
```
Vault/
├── LifeOS/        - 51 file di configurazione del sistema
└── Soliwkr/       - Note personali, dashboard, templates
    ├── 5_Structure Notes/  - Architettura del sistema
    ├── Assets/
    ├── 🧠 Centro di Controllo.md
    ├── 🎯 Dashboard Minimal.md
    ├── Templates/          - Template Obsidian/Markdown
    ├── Visuals/
    ├── .obsidian/          - Configurazione Obsidian
    └── .smart-env/         - Ambiente smart
```

### 10. SCRIPTS
**Percorso:** `~/Scripts/`

**Disponibili:**
```
transfer.sh - Script per transfer file (402 bytes)
```

### 11. 1PASSWORD STATUS
**Configurazione:** PRESENTE
```
URL:      my.1password.com
EMAIL:    soliwkr@gmail.com
USER ID:  77GOF4OSGRC7TLCCRZJ22AELNQ
```

**Servizio systemd user:** **NON DISPONIBILE**

### 12. CHEZMOI STATUS
**Command output:** `ERROR`

Questo indica che chezmoi potrebbe avere problemi oppure necessita inizializzazione.

### 13. HISTORY CHEZMOI
```
df68d79 feat: server SSH config + auto-clone repos on new machine
caef61c feat: 1Password SSH agent + fix ssh/config tracking
bf331a8 init: chezmoi dotfiles — Arch/Fedora agnostic
```

## COSA MANCA PER COMPLETARE LA WORKSTATION STATELESS

### CRITICI:
1. **`.gitconfig`** - Non trackato in chezmoi. Necessario: aggiungere a `chezmoi` e deployare
2. **`chezmoi status` fallisce** - Diagnosticare perché ritorna ERROR
3. **1Password service** - Non attivo come servizio systemd user
4. **SSH key setup** - Le chiavi in `/tmp/1p-import/` devono essere importate in 1Password

### IMPORTANTI:
5. **Script di setup completo** - Necesario uno script che orchestri:
   - Inizializzazione 1Password
   - Import chiavi SSH
   - Deploy chezmoi
   - Clone repository
   - Setup servizi user

6. **Validazione della macchina** - Check che:
   - Omarchy sia installato (Arch Linux)
   - Tutti i pacchetti da `packages-*.txt` siano installati
   - Configurazioni applicate correttamente

7. **Vault / Obsidian** - Non trackato in dotfiles (corretto per sicurezza)

### DA VERIFICARE:
8. **OpenCode** - Percorso `~/.opencode/bin` in PATH, ma non presente in chezmoi
9. **Mise** - Trackato in config, verificare che funzioni
10. **Desktop environment** - Hypr, waybar, ghostty trackati ma non testati dopo deploy

---

**Prossimi step consigliati:**
1. Aggiungere `.gitconfig` a chezmoi
2. Diagnosticare `chezmoi status`
3. Creare script di bootstrap che gestisca 1Password init
4. Testare deploy completo su macchina pulita
